init_mcp_registry: initialize the MCP server registry singleton and discover all tools from registered servers
discover_all: discover tools from all registered MCP servers concurrently and build the route table
search_tools: search available MCP tools by query string across name, description, and tags
get_tools_for_litellm: export registered MCP tools in LiteLLM-compatible format for function calling
health_check: check the health of a specific registered MCP server by probing its endpoints
